name: Space Elevator
desc: A vast pillar, stretching from surface to outer space, connects Lodestone to Port Augustmoon. The space-borne end of the structure acts as a massive drydock. Increased demand for fuel and crew.

name: Barren World
desc: This partially-terraformed world is barren and inhospitable. However, cutting-edge agricultural techniques have been successful at wringing out a small amount of farming production from the hellish landscape.
